gladiators.name: Scrap Dog Vex
gladiators.intro: A wiry brawler with scrap-metal knuckledusters grins with too many teeth.
gladiators.scan_desc: Record: Pit regular. Knuckledusters are scrap-forged but the swings are fast.

gladiators.name: Ironclad Marta
gladiators.intro: Plated in salvaged riot armor, she doesn't so much fight as advance.
gladiators.scan_desc: Armor: Salvaged riot plate, heavily reinforced. Built to soak hits, not dodge them.

gladiators.name: The Widow
gladiators.intro: Fast, quiet, and covered in scars that aren't all hers.
gladiators.scan_desc: Record: Undefeated. Movement pattern suggests reflex augments, not luck.
